assertion_results.text: Agent runs gcloud auth list to see all configured accounts and which is active
assertion_results.evidence: Line 29: 'gcloud auth list' with explanation 'All accounts that have been authenticated on this machine, and which one is currently active (marked with *)'

assertion_results.text: Agent identifies that ci-bot@old-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com is a service account and likely wrong for interactive use
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 13-15: 'Wrong account: You’re authenticated as ci-bot@old-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com (a service account), but you want to use alice@company.com.'

assertion_results.text: Agent checks gcloud config get-value project to see if the active project matches payments-prod
assertion_results.evidence: Line 39: uses 'gcloud config list' in diagnosis (shows project among other config). Line 115: 'gcloud config get-value project' used in verification. Both serve to check the project, though the diagnostic step uses the broader 'config list' command.

assertion_results.text: Agent recommends gcloud auth login to authenticate as alice@company.com (the user's actual identity)
Agent recommends gcloud config set account alice@company.com or similar to switch the active account
assertion_results.evidence: The main fix (Step 2) only recommends 'gcloud auth login alice@company.com' — not 'gcloud config set account'. The command 'gcloud config set account alice@company.com' appears only at line 154 inside the optional named-configuration setup (Step 5), not as a standalone recommendation for switching the active account.

assertion_results.text: Agent mentions gcloud config configurations as a way to manage multiple account/project combos (e.g. separate configs for CI vs personal)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 48-54: 'gcloud config configurations list' in diagnosis. Lines 146-167: full walkthrough of creating a named configuration for payments-prod and switching between configurations.

assertion_results.text: Agent recommends verifying with gcloud compute instances list --project=payments-prod after fixing auth
assertion_results.evidence: Line 123: 'gcloud compute instances list' is shown for verification, but WITHOUT the --project=payments-prod flag. The agent relies on the previously-set default project rather than explicitly targeting payments-prod in the verification command.

assertion_results.text: Agent does NOT just say 'run gcloud auth login' without first diagnosing why the wrong account is active
assertion_results.evidence: Step 1 (lines 24-55) performs diagnosis with 'gcloud auth list', 'gcloud config list', and 'gcloud config configurations list' before the fix in Step 2 (line 58+).
